With OLMv1, you'll get a much simpler AP: With OLMv1, you'll get a much simpler API that's easier to work with and understand. Plus, you have more direct control over updates. You can define update ranges and decide exactly how they are rolled out.
Lets you use OLMv1 (Tech Preview), a str: Lets you use OLMv1 (Tech Preview), a streamlined redesign of OLMv0. OLMv1 simplifies operator management with declarative APIs, enhanced security, and direct, GitOps-friendly control over upgrades.
